candidate_grammar.boundary: All finite mutual and conditional information structures generated from complete deterministic support, two total observation maps, their exact marginal classes, complete joint cells and exact positive part relations.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of support, two observations, marginal classes, joint incidence, conditional restriction, dependence comparison, factorization, deterministic status, generality and extra-measure status.

excluded_inputs: no signed or floating dependence score
no stochastic cause or prior distribution
no incomplete joint census presented as factorization
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 1024-candidate product, its sole all-preserving survivor, closure properties and controls.
statement: Conditional information is the complete exact restriction of one total observation to every class of another. Mutual dependence is the complete joint-incidence ledger comparing each observed joint support part with the product of its exact marginal parts; absent cells remain structural empty One and no signed subtraction is used. Factorization holds exactly when every joint cell is present and its part equals the marginal product. Thus conditioning and dependence are derived from deterministic support and observation, without priors, logarithms, stochastic causes or floating values.
title: Exact mutual and conditional information from joint observation incidence
